description: A Kanban board web application built with Bun + React + TailwindCSS, featuring SQLite persistence and drag-and-drop task management with a Solarized Dark theme.

user_stories.title: View Default Columns
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to see three default columns (Todo, In Progress, Done) when I open the app, so I can immediately start organizing my tasks.
acceptance_criteria: App loads with three columns by default
Default column names are: 'Todo', 'In Progress', 'Done'
Columns are displayed horizontally on the screen
Each column shows its title and contains any existing tasks

user_stories.title: Create New Task
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to create a new task with a title and description in any column, so I can capture work items.
acceptance_criteria: Each column has an 'Add Task' button
Clicking 'Add Task' opens a form with title and description fields
Task title is required (cannot be empty)
Task description is optional
Task description can render markdown
New task is saved to SQLite database
New task appears immediately in the column without page refresh
Form can be cancelled without creating a task

user_stories.title: Edit Task
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to edit the title and description of an existing task, so I can update task information.
acceptance_criteria: Each task has an edit button/icon
Clicking edit opens a modal with current title and description in editable fields
Changes are saved to SQLite database on submit
Changes are reflected immediately in the UI
Edit form can be cancelled without saving changes
Title validation (cannot be empty) applies to edits

user_stories.title: Delete Task
user_stories.description: As a user, I want to delete a task, so I can remove tasks that are no longer relevant.
acceptance_criteria: Each task has a delete button/icon
Clicking delete shows a confirmation dialog
Confirmed deletion permanently removes the task from SQLite
Task is removed from UI immediately after confirmation
Delete operation can be cancelled from confirmation dialog
